data.body:
#ufosky #ufo #ufohistory
Today in UFO History - Large Black Triangle Over Denmark
April 15, 1958 — Broager, Denmark
1/Day. A witness in Broager, Denmark, sees a large, black, low-flying, triangular object. As it flies over town, a number of horseshoe-shaped objects emerge, emitting a strong light.
